────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ◐  optiqor
  Helm chart cost optimization · security as a bonus
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  Source      <REPO>/testdata/fixtures/basic-chart/values.yaml
  Workloads   15 workloads analyzed
  Cost        25 optimizations · save ~$35.39/mo (~$424.68/yr) ±40%
  Security    49 findings — bonus, surfaced while parsing

━━ Cost optimizations ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  ┌─ MED · api ──────────────────────────────────────────────── save ~$29.20/mo ─┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU request appears overprovisioned                                          │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      2      ███████████████████░░░░░ 2.5   80% of limit                  │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 2 vs limit 2.5 — typical utilization rarely justifies this           │
  │ ratio. Consider halving the request.                                         │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · guaranteed ────────────────────────────────────────── save ~$2.92/mo ─┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU request appears overprovisioned                                          │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      200m   ████████████████████████ 200m   100% of limit                │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 200m vs limit 200m — typical utilization rarely justifies this       │
  │ ratio. Consider halving the request.                                         │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · api ───────────────────────────────────────────────── save ~$2.79/mo ─┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ Memory request appears overprovisioned                                       │
  │                                                                              │
  │ memory   1.6Gi  ███████████████████░░░░░ 2Gi   80% of limit                  │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 1.6Gi vs limit 2Gi — typical utilization rarely justifies this       │
  │ ratio. Consider halving the request.                                         │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · guaranteed ────────────────────────────────────────── save ~$0.43/mo ─┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ Memory request appears overprovisioned                                       │
  │                                                                              │
  │ memory   256Mi  ████████████████████████ 256Mi   100% of limit               │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 256Mi vs limit 256Mi — typical utilization rarely justifies this     │
  │ ratio. Consider halving the request.                                         │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · incomplete ────────────────────────────────────────── save ~$0.05/mo ─┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU request appears overprovisioned                                          │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      5m     ████████████████████████ 5m   100% of limit                  │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 5m vs limit 5m — typical utilization rarely justifies this           │
  │ ratio. Consider halving the request.                                         │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · bursty ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU limit is many multiples of the request                                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      200m   ██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 2   10.0x burst                     │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 200m vs limit 2 — a 10.0x burst window. The scheduler reserves       │
  │ only the request, so the pod can suddenly consume far more than its          │
  │ node-allocation suggests. Tighten the limit or raise the request to match    │
  │ observed P95.                                                                │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · bursty ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ Memory limit is many multiples of the request                                │
  │                                                                              │
  │ memory   256Mi  ██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 4Gi   16.0x burst                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 256Mi vs limit 4Gi — a 16.0x burst window. Memory limits aren't      │
  │ elastic the way CPU is: a pod that climbs to its limit will OOM, taking      │
  │ neighbours down via node memory pressure. Tighten the limit toward           │
  │ observed P95.                                                                │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · cache ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU limit is many multiples of the request                                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      100m   █████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 500m   5.0x burst                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 100m vs limit 500m — a 5.0x burst window. The scheduler reserves     │
  │ only the request, so the pod can suddenly consume far more than its          │
  │ node-allocation suggests. Tighten the limit or raise the request to match    │
  │ observed P95.                                                                │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · clean ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU limit is many multiples of the request                                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      100m   █████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 500m   5.0x burst                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 100m vs limit 500m — a 5.0x burst window. The scheduler reserves     │
  │ only the request, so the pod can suddenly consume far more than its          │
  │ node-allocation suggests. Tighten the limit or raise the request to match    │
  │ observed P95.                                                                │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · dev-build ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ Floating image tag prevents reproducible deploys                             │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Image tag 'main' is a floating reference: upstream re-points it whenever     │
  │ they publish. The same Helm release can therefore land different bytes on    │
  │ consecutive deploys, and rollbacks become ambiguous. Pin to an immutable     │
  │ digest or version tag.                                                       │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●● high                                                         │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · logger ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU limit is many multiples of the request                                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      100m   █████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 500m   5.0x burst                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 100m vs limit 500m — a 5.0x burst window. The scheduler reserves     │
  │ only the request, so the pod can suddenly consume far more than its          │
  │ node-allocation suggests. Tighten the limit or raise the request to match    │
  │ observed P95.                                                                │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · megabox ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ Replica count past the HA inflection point                                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ replicas 20     ███████████████████░░░░░ 25   25 replicas                    │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Replicas set to 25. Past ~20 replicas the cost grows linearly while the      │
  │ marginal availability gain approaches zero — most cloud zones can't fit      │
  │ that many across enough fault domains. Cap the HPA's maxReplicas or split    │
  │ the workload across multiple deployments.                                    │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · megabox ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU limit forces large-node scheduling                                       │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      2      ██████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 8   limit > 4 vCPU                  │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU limit is 8. Above 4 vCPU, the pod can only land on large nodes;          │
  │ smaller / Spot instance types are excluded from bin-packing. Either split    │
  │ the workload or confirm the high limit is justified by P99.                  │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · megabox ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ Memory limit forces large-node scheduling                                    │
  │                                                                              │
  │ memory   8Gi    ██████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 32Gi   limit > 16 GiB               │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Memory limit is 32Gi. Above 16 GiB, the pod can only land on memory-class    │
  │ nodes; balanced / Spot bin-packing is excluded. Confirm the workload         │
  │ genuinely uses this much, or split the workload.                             │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · megabox ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ High static replica count without an autoscaler                              │
  │                                                                              │
  │ replicas 5      █████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 25   5x target                      │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Replicas set to 25 without an HPA. Static high replica counts pay for        │
  │ unused capacity 24/7. Either enable autoscaling.enabled=true or right-size   │
  │ the static count to your observed P95.                                       │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · ptrace-hunter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU limit is many multiples of the request                                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      100m   █████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 500m   5.0x burst                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 100m vs limit 500m — a 5.0x burst window. The scheduler reserves     │
  │ only the request, so the pod can suddenly consume far more than its          │
  │ node-allocation suggests. Tighten the limit or raise the request to match    │
  │ observed P95.                                                                │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · shipper ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU limit is many multiples of the request                                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      100m   █████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 500m   5.0x burst                   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request 100m vs limit 500m — a 5.0x burst window. The scheduler reserves     │
  │ only the request, so the pod can suddenly consume far more than its          │
  │ node-allocation suggests. Tighten the limit or raise the request to match    │
  │ observed P95.                                                                │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ MED · shipper ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ High static replica count without an autoscaler                              │
  │                                                                              │
  │ replicas 5      ████████████░░░░░░░░░░░░ 10   2x target                      │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Replicas set to 10 without an HPA. Static high replica counts pay for        │
  │ unused capacity 24/7. Either enable autoscaling.enabled=true or right-size   │
  │ the static count to your observed P95.                                       │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ LOW · guaranteed ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU request equals limit (Guaranteed QoS)                                    │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      200m   ████████████████████████ 200m   Guaranteed QoS               │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request and limit both set to 200m, putting the pod in Guaranteed QoS —      │
  │ top eviction priority but zero burst headroom. Confirm this is intentional   │
  │ for an SLO-bound workload; otherwise lower the request to allow the          │
  │ scheduler to bin-pack more densely.                                          │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ LOW · guaranteed ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ Memory request equals limit (Guaranteed QoS)                                 │
  │                                                                              │
  │ memory   256Mi  ████████████████████████ 256Mi   Guaranteed QoS              │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Memory request and limit both set to 256Mi. Memory is non-burstable          │
  │ anyway, so this only affects QoS class; for SLO-bound workloads it's         │
  │ correct, otherwise lower the request to ~P95 to free node capacity for       │
  │ other pods.                                                                  │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ LOW · incomplete ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU request equals limit (Guaranteed QoS)                                    │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      5m     ████████████████████████ 5m   Guaranteed QoS                 │
  │                                                                              │
  │ Request and limit both set to 5m, putting the pod in Guaranteed QoS —        │
  │ top eviction priority but zero burst headroom. Confirm this is intentional   │
  │ for an SLO-bound workload; otherwise lower the request to allow the          │
  │ scheduler to bin-pack more densely.                                          │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●○ medium                                                       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ LOW · incomplete ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU request set without memory request                                       │
  │                                                                              │
  │ memory   unset  ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ required   memory request missing   │
  │                                                                              │
  │ requests.cpu is set but requests.memory is not. The scheduler can't          │
  │ reserve memory accurately, so the pod is BestEffort for memory — first       │
  │ to evict under pressure. Add a memory request matching observed P95.         │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●● high                                                         │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ LOW · incomplete ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU request below the placeholder threshold                                  │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      5m     ████████████░░░░░░░░░░░░ 10m   below 10m sentinel            │
  │                                                                              │
  │ requests.cpu is 5m — below the 10m threshold most charts use as a            │
  │ sentinel. Probably a placeholder from a Helm scaffold. Set it to your        │
  │ observed P95 (or remove the limit-without-request asymmetry the scheduler    │
  │ is currently dealing with).                                                  │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●● high                                                         │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ LOW · memhog ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ Memory request set without CPU request                                       │
  │                                                                              │
  │ CPU      unset  ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ required   CPU request missing      │
  │                                                                              │
  │ requests.memory is set but requests.cpu is not. The scheduler can't          │
  │ reserve CPU, so bin-packing assumes zero — pods can stack onto a single      │
  │ node and starve each other. Add a CPU request matching observed P95.         │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●● high                                                         │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌─ LOW · memhog ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                              │
  │ Memory request below the placeholder threshold                               │
  │                                                                              │
  │ memory   16Mi   ████████████░░░░░░░░░░░░ 32Mi   below 32Mi sentinel          │
  │                                                                              │
  │ requests.memory is 16Mi — below 32 MiB. A workload that genuinely needs      │
  │ less memory is a rarity; most charts setting tiny memory requests are        │
  │ using a placeholder. Set it to your observed P95.                            │
  │                                                                              │
  │ confidence: ●●● high                                                         │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘


━━ Security findings  (bonus, 49) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  Spotted while parsing your chart. Cost is the headline; this is a bonus.

   HIGH   admin-tool      ●●●   allowPrivilegeEscalation explicitly enabled
   HIGH   admin-tool      ●●●   Container declared privileged
   HIGH   admin-tool      ●●●   Container runs as root
   MED    admin-tool      ●●●   capabilities.drop does not include ALL
   MED    admin-tool      ●●○   ServiceAccount token automatically mounted
   MED    api             ●●○   allowPrivilegeEscalation not declared
   MED    api             ●●●   capabilities.drop does not include ALL
   MED    api             ●●○   runAsNonRoot not declared
   MED    api             ●●○   ServiceAccount token automatically mounted
   LOW    api             ●●○   readOnlyRootFilesystem not declared
   MED    bursty          ●●●   capabilities.drop does not include ALL
   MED    bursty          ●●○   ServiceAccount token automatically mounted
   MED    cache           ●●○   allowPrivilegeEscalation not declared
   MED    cache           ●●●   capabilities.drop does not include ALL
   MED    cache           ●●●   Image not pinned to a stable tag
   MED    cache           ●●○   ServiceAccount token automatically mounted
   LOW    cache           ●●○   readOnlyRootFilesystem not declared
   MED    dev-build       ●●●   capabilities.drop does not include ALL
   MED    dev-build       ●●○   ServiceAccount token automatically mounted
   LOW    dev-build       ●●○   readOnlyRootFilesystem not declared
   MED    guaranteed      ●●○   ServiceAccount token automatically mounted
   MED    logger          ●●○   allowPrivilegeEscalation not declared
   MED    logger          ●●●   capabilities.drop does not include ALL
   MED    logger          ●●●   Image not pinned to a stable tag
   MED    logger          ●●○   ServiceAccount token automatically mounted
   LOW    logger          ●●○   readOnlyRootFilesystem not declared
   HIGH   memhog          ●●●   Pod shares the host IPC namespace
   HIGH   memhog          ●●●   Memory limit not set
   HIGH   ptrace-hunter   ●●●   Dangerous Linux capability added
   HIGH   ptrace-hunter   ●●●   Pod shares the host PID namespace
   HIGH   ptrace-hunter   ●●●   Container runs as root
   HIGH   ptrace-hunter   ●●●   runAsUser explicitly set to 0
   MED    ptrace-hunter   ●●○   allowPrivilegeEscalation not declared
   MED    ptrace-hunter   ●●●   capabilities.drop does not include ALL
   LOW    ptrace-hunter   ●●○   readOnlyRootFilesystem not declared
   MED    shipper         ●●○   allowPrivilegeEscalation not declared
   MED    shipper         ●●●   capabilities.drop does not include ALL
   MED    shipper         ●●○   ServiceAccount token automatically mounted
   LOW    shipper         ●●○   readOnlyRootFilesystem not declared
   HIGH   sniffer         ●●●   Pod uses host network
   HIGH   sniffer         ●●●   Pod mounts a hostPath volume
   MED    sniffer         ●●●   capabilities.drop does not include ALL
   MED    sniffer         ●●○   ServiceAccount token automatically mounted
   HIGH   worker          ●●●   Memory limit not set
   MED    worker          ●●○   allowPrivilegeEscalation not declared
   MED    worker          ●●●   capabilities.drop does not include ALL
   MED    worker          ●●○   ServiceAccount token automatically mounted
   LOW    worker          ●●○   CPU limit not set
   LOW    worker          ●●○   readOnlyRootFilesystem not declared

  Run `optiqor audit` to focus only on these findings.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  estimated monthly savings: $35.39/mo   (±40%)
  Sandbox accuracy: ±40%. Install the Optiqor agent for exact numbers (optiqor.dev/get).
  → install the agent for exact numbers: optiqor.dev/get (https://optiqor.dev/get)
